arts.sum: Jhon Duran is a striker in demand but to date Aston Villa have rebuffed all offers for him. That could change after PSG made the Premier League outfit a tempting proposal. arts.sum: Part of the Maresca bomb squad, the left-back does not have a future at Stamford Bridge and is looking for opportunities elsewhere. Enzo Maresca has a burgeoning squad at Stamford Bridge, and with the UEFA Conference League the Italian has managed his players extremely well.

arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United re-established contact for Argentine forward Alejandro Garnacho on Friday. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the Serie A pacesetters renewed talks with the Red Devils yesterday as they bid to complete a mouth-watering double swoop this winter.
